text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: One, two, one, two. Cross the legs here...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hyaaa!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Awww, I messed up again... I've got to keep
practicing...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Gyah! Big Brother?! Y-you found me...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Gyah! Big Sister?! Y-you found me...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... I just thought I could get some practice
in since no one was around.
choice_data_list: Why are you practicing by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Earlier, when we were having a lesson as a class,
the... um, the power in the studio went out.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The lesson was canceled... If I hadn't been there,
I'm sure that wouldn't have happened...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I made a big mess for everyone... That's why I'm
practicing alone.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...You should leave before something bad
happens to you too, Big Brother.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...You should leave before something bad
happens to you too, Big Sister.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Th-that's not it! I don't mind you being here!
choice_data_list: In that case, let me help you train.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Th-that's not it! I don't mind you being here!
choice_data_list: In that case, let me help you train.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Could you point out the parts in the dance where
I mess up?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Could you point out the parts in the dance where
I mess up?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower practices exhaustively to overcome
her weaknesses when dancing.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! N-no, I don't want to trouble you!
choice_data_list: And I don't want to see you struggle alone.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?! N-no, I don't want to trouble you!
choice_data_list: And I don't want to see you struggle alone.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Brother...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Big Sister...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Could... could you help me with practice then?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you! There's actually this difficult part...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I continue to help Rice Shower practice late into
the night.
